sections.content:
Now I see the full picture. After SPACE+UP:
- The center box (rows 28-31) is still there with gray interior (g). The bottom box area (rows 32-35) now has a gray frame (G) with blue interior (b). The white strip (W) is at row 36, and the green block (N) is at rows 37-39.
So the green block didn't move through the center box. The SPACE action seems to have opened the bottom box (removed the charcoal frame), and the green block moved up one step but is still below the center box.
Wait, let me re-examine. The green block was at rows 41-43, then moved to 37-39 after the first UP. Then SPACE+UP didn't move it further.
Actually, looking more carefully:
- The green block is at rows 37-39, and the white strip is at row 36, and the gray-framed box is at rows 32-35. So the green block is below the center box (rows 28-31).
So the pattern seems to be:
1. SPACE opens the box directly above the green block
2. UP moves the green block up through the opened box
3. The green block is now below the center box. I need to SPACE again to open it.
Let me try SPACE again to open the center box, then UP to move through it.
